Fields.Description: The energy consumption of this part.

Fields.Description: The category name text ID to use for this part.

Fields.Description: The kinetic defense value for display in the menu only.

Fields.Name: Menu Display: Energy Defense
Fields.Description: The energy defense value for display in the menu only.

Fields.Name: LookAt ID
Fields.Description: The LookAt parameter to use for this part.

Fields.Name: LookAt Direction Type
Fields.Description: The direction type to use when applying the LookAt.

Fields.Name: Left Weapon Hanger Type
Fields.Description: The type of weapon used in the left-weapon hanger.

Fields.Name: Right Weapon Hanger Type
Fields.Description: The type of weapon used in the right-weapon hanger.

Fields.Name: Legs Animation Category Offset
Fields.Description:
The animatio ID offset used for overriding animations for legs parts.
Value of 1 utilizes TAE a010, 3 uses a030, etc.
Used with Lammergeier for hovering and assault boost animations.

Fields.Name: Poise Durability Recovery
Fields.Description: The base recovery rate for poise durability with this part. In points per second.

Fields.Name: Energy Capacity
Fields.Description: The energy capacity of this booster.

Fields.Name: Energy Output
Fields.Description: The energy recovery rate. In points per second.

Fields.Name: Energy Output Delay
Fields.Description: The delay before energy recovery starts. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Thruster Param ID (Player only)
Fields.Description: The thurster paramters to use when this part is equipped. Only affects players.

Fields.Name: Poise Damage Absorption %
Fields.Description: The poise damage absorption rate when this part is equipped.

Fields.Name: Weapon Param ID: Right
Fields.Description: Used to define weapon parameters for equipments parts that require it: Head parts for scanning, Core Expansion parts for their effects.

Fields.Name: LookAt ID: Head
Fields.Description: The LookAt parameter to use for this part. Only for head parts.

Fields.Name: Foot Effect Particle ID (for Legs)
Fields.Description: The foot effect SFX ID to use for legs parts. Player only.

Fields.Name: Foot Glide Effect Particle ID (for Legs)
Fields.Description: The foot effect SFX ID to use for legs parts when gliding. Player only.

Fields.Name: Weapon Param ID: Left
Fields.Description: Used to define weapon parameters for equipments parts that require it: Head parts for scanning, Core Expansion parts for their effects.

Fields.Name: Ground Horizontal Brake % (for Legs)
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to the ground braking velocity if this part is equipped.

Fields.Name: Ground Quick Boost: Initial Velocity Addition (for Legs)
Fields.Description: The additional initial velocity added during a ground quick boost if this part is equipped. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Firearm Specialization
Fields.Description: Affects the shooting performance curve if this part is equipped.

Fields.Name: Attitude Stability
Fields.Description: The attitude stability adjustment if this part is equipped.

Fields.Name: Energy Recovery Delay (when Empty)
Fields.Description: The duration to wait for energy recovery (when energy is empty).

Fields.Name: Recoil Control (for Arms)
Fields.Description: The correction value used for shooting blur if this part is equipped. Affects arms parts only.

Fields.Name: Tetrapod: Hover Energy Consumption (for Legs)
Fields.Description: The energy consumption whilst hovering, if this part is a tetrapod legs part. In points per second.

Fields.Name: Tetrapod: Hover Quick Boost: Initial Velocity Addition (for Legs)
Fields.Description: The additional initial velocity added during a ground quick boost if this part is equipped, and it is a tetrapod legs parts. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Corporation Texture ID
Fields.Description: The coporation logo to show for this part.

Fields.Name: Menu Management Category
Fields.Description: The equipment menu category this part appears in.

Fields.Name: Demonstration Video ID
Fields.Description: Refers to the bink video filename in Game/movie/

Fields.Name: Recoil Knockback %: Ground (for Legs)
Fields.Description:
Multiplier of backwards velocity applied to the shooter when using a weapon on the ground.
Applies conditionally, such as not applying when AC has tank legs.

Fields.Name: Recoil Knockback %: Aerial (for Legs)
Fields.Description: Multiplier of backwards velocity applied to the shooter when using a weapon in the air.

Fields.Name: Decal Placement: Camera Offset Distance
Fields.Description: The camera offset to use when placing a decal.

Fields.Name: Load Limit (for Arms)
Fields.Description: The maximum weight (from weapon parts) that arms can handle before being overloaded.

Fields.Name: Energy Specialization (for Arms)
Fields.Description: The multiplier applied to energy damage with this part equipped.

Fields.Name: Melee Specialization (for Arms)
Fields.Description: The multiplier applied to melee damage with this part equipped.

Fields.Name: Load Limit (for Legs)
Fields.Description: The maximum weight that legs can handle before being overloaded.

Fields.Name: Built-in Booster ID (for Legs)
Fields.Description: The booster parameters to use when this Legs part is equipped instead of those from a dedicated booster part.

Fields.Name: Movement Control ID (for Legs)
Fields.Description: The movement control parameters used for this Legs part.

Fields.Name: Rotation Control ID (for Legs)
Fields.Description: The rotation control parameters used for this Legs part.

Fields.Description: The maximum horizontal angle of the wall jump. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Scan: Angle
Fields.Description: The angle to use when scanning. In degrees.

Fields.Description: Is an additive animation change applied based on the weight class of the character.

Fields.Description: The animation offset to apply to weapons when the part is equipped. (ID of a0X0_000000)
